announcements.title: Spring 2026 curriculum change
announcements.body: ECE 130 is now a prerequisite for ECE 153 per the 25-26 GEAR update. Update your plan if you are on the old grid.

questions.title: Is ECE 152A really that hard?
questions.body: Junior here — how much time should I budget for labs and homework?

answers.body: Plan 10-12 hrs/week. The filter design project is the heaviest part — start early.

questions.title: CMPSC 130A before 64?
questions.body: Is it okay to take 130A the same quarter as 64?

answers.body: Not recommended — 64 content shows up in 130A assignments. Finish 64 first if possible.

contributor_spotlight.bio: Maintains EE and CS roadmaps from GEAR 25-26 and UCSBPlat course descriptions.
